name: localized_color_focus
description: Highlights compact, high-saliency local regions with zoomed contrast-enhanced crops to support inspection of object or clothing color without predicting the answer.
applicability_conditions: Use this tool for direct multiple-choice attribute questions when the target is a visible local entity or accessory tied to a referenced person/object, especially when the failure mode is missing a small colored item due to lack of focused inspection. It is appropriate on raw images or prior artifacts when the scene is cluttered, the target occupies a small fraction of the frame, or a person/object needs closer localized color reading. It supports variations such as handbags, clothing items, or similarly localized visible attributes, but not OCR, counting, or ambiguous target resolution requiring deeper reasoning.
